name: Phase 2 smoke condition B (scope-unaware Plan-and-Solve) on FrontierScience-Olympiad
short_description: Per-row predictions from the scope-unaware Plan-and-Solve agent (condition B) on FrontierScience-Olympiad rows of the v2 hierarchical-annotation dataset, paired with conditions A and C.
model_description: claude-haiku-4-5 (Anthropic) accessed via the local Claude Code CLI with a minimal system prompt. Agent library: scope_unaware_planandsolve_v1 (t0007). Tool registry: minimal calculator + finish only. No granularity tag (condition B by design).
prediction_schema: Each line is a JSON object with fields: condition, task_id, problem, gold_answer, final_answer, is_correct, decision_count, final_confidence, trajectory, agent_refused.

files.description: Per-row predictions for condition B on the 40 FrontierScience-Olympiad hierarchy-complete rows of hierarchical-annotation-v2.
